logs.message: ExpenseApi depends on Microsoft.ApplicationInsights.AspNetCore (>= 2.22.5) but Microsoft.ApplicationInsights.AspNetCore 2.22.5 was not found. Microsoft.ApplicationInsights.AspNetCore 2.23.0 was resolved instead.
ExpenseApi depends on Serilog (>= 4.2.1) but Serilog 4.2.1 was not found. Serilog 4.3.0 was resolved instead.
ExpenseApi depends on Serilog.AspNetCore (>= 9.1.0) but Serilog.AspNetCore 9.1.0 was not found. Serilog.AspNetCore 10.0.0 was resolved instead.
ExpenseApi depends on Serilog.Sinks.ApplicationInsights (>= 4.1.1) but Serilog.Sinks.ApplicationInsights 4.1.1 was not found. Serilog.Sinks.ApplicationInsights 5.0.0 was resolved instead.
Package 'AutoMapper' 12.0.1 has a known high severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rvv3-g6hj-g44x
